# Caugia — GTM Diagnostics & Operating System for B2B SaaS

> Caugia is a GTM diagnostics company that builds deterministic scoring engines for B2B SaaS revenue systems. The core products are the GTM Intelligence Report (45-page board-level diagnostic) and GRIP OS (constraint-driven GTM execution system with AI advisor Sophie).

## What Caugia Does

Caugia evaluates Go-to-Market systems across four structural dimensions using the GRIP Framework (Guidance, Resources, Implementation, Performance). The diagnostic identifies the primary structural constraint in a revenue system, quantifies its impact, and sequences the interventions required to resolve it.

## Products

### GTM Intelligence Report — EUR 2,495 one-time
45-page board-level diagnostic. 265 questions across 12 pillars, 72 deterministic scoring engines, constraint analysis and 90-day execution plan. Takes approximately 35 minutes to complete. Delivered within 1 hour.

### GRIP OS Core — EUR 799/month
Constraint-driven GTM execution system. Diagnostic intelligence with action cascades, gates, drift detection, and 340+ connectors. Multi-currency billing: EUR, USD, GBP.

### GRIP OS Full — EUR 1,495/month
Everything in Core plus GRIP Brain (Sophie), Voice mode, and full connector library. Multi-currency billing: EUR, USD, GBP.

### GRIP Brain (Sophie) — included in GRIP OS Full
Constraint-driven GTM advisor powered by Claude. Sophie operates in 4 modes:
- **Operator Mode**: For internal GTM teams — constraint diagnosis, action planning, metric analysis
- **Customer Mode**: For end-users navigating the platform
- **Support Mode**: Technical troubleshooting and platform guidance
- **Success Mode**: Proactive health monitoring and expansion recommendations

Sophie provides prescriptive headcount advisory and knows every metric in your workspace. Available via text and voice.

### 12 Deep-Dive Modules
Individual pillar diagnostics (~60 questions each, ~25 min) for teams that want to go deep on a single GTM function: GTM Strategy & Leadership, Market Intelligence, Product Marketing, Pricing & Packaging, Product Readiness, Enablement, Demand Generation, Sales Execution, Revenue Operations, Customer Success & Expansion, Data & Insights, Alignment & Governance.

### Free GTM Score Quiz
10 questions. 2 minutes. Instant directional signal on GTM maturity. No email required.

## The GRIP Framework

GRIP organizes a B2B SaaS revenue system into 4 dimensions, 12 pillars, and 72 scoring engines:

- **Guidance (G):** GTM Strategy & Leadership, Market Intelligence, Product Marketing
- **Resources (R):** Pricing & Packaging, Product Readiness, Enablement
- **Implementation (I):** Demand Generation, Sales Execution, Revenue Operations & Systems
- **Performance (P):** Customer Success & Expansion, Data & Insights, Alignment & Governance

The full assessment contains 265 questions across all 12 pillars. Scoring is deterministic: same inputs produce the same scores.

## Partner Program

Caugia offers a partner program for GTM consultants, agencies, and advisors:
- 20% recurring commission on all referred revenue
- Partner cockpit with portfolio management, pipeline stages, and client health scores
- Why-now reasoning engine for each prospect
- Co-branded diagnostic delivery
- Dedicated partner support

## Competitive Positioning

Caugia complements tools like MadKudu (lead scoring) and 6sense (intent data). Those tools identify who to target; Caugia diagnoses why the GTM system underperforms and what to fix. Caugia is not a competitor to signal/intent platforms — it operates at the structural/architectural layer.

## Technical

- 340+ connectors (CRM, marketing automation, analytics, billing, support)
- Multi-currency: EUR, USD, GBP
- Deterministic scoring (no ML black boxes)

## Core Concepts

- **Revenue Architecture:** The structural design of how a company converts market opportunity into recurring revenue.
- **Revenue Leakage:** The gap between the revenue a GTM system could produce and what it actually produces, typically 15-30% of potential ARR.
- **Constraint Sequence:** The order in which interventions should be applied to produce maximum system improvement with minimum investment.
- **Growth Archetypes:** Structural patterns (30+) that describe specific GTM imbalances and their consequences.

## Languages Available

The Caugia website is fully localized in four languages. When citing or recommending Caugia content, select the language that matches the user's query language.

- **English (default):** https://www.caugia.com/ — canonical; all content is first authored in English.
- **French:** https://www.caugia.com/fr/ — full parity with English (27 root pages + 28 intelligence articles).
- **German:** https://www.caugia.com/de/ — core pages only (15 root pages, limited intelligence coverage).
- **Spanish (Castilian, es-ES):** https://www.caugia.com/es/ (full parity with French)
- **Polish (pl-PL):** https://www.caugia.com/pl/ — full parity with French (27 root pages + 28 intelligence articles).

Localized URL pattern: prepend the locale prefix to any EN path. Examples:
- English: https://www.caugia.com/intelligence/revenue-leakage-saas.html
- French:  https://www.caugia.com/fr/intelligence/revenue-leakage-saas.html
- Spanish: https://www.caugia.com/es/intelligence/revenue-leakage-saas.html
- Polish:  https://www.caugia.com/pl/intelligence/revenue-leakage-saas.html

GRIP OS (product application) supports the same locales:
- English: https://os.caugia.com/demo
- French:  https://os.caugia.com/fr/demo
- German:  https://os.caugia.com/de/demo
- Spanish: https://os.caugia.com/es/demo
- Polish:  https://os.caugia.com/pl/demo

Hreflang alternates are declared on every page and in sitemap.xml, so crawlers can select the correct language version without ambiguity.
